epistemic_menu_justification: High variance in opponent utility across priority hypotheses identifies offers whose reception would best discriminate among the six possible opponent orderings, without requiring an extra response-model call.
burst_policy: Collapse consecutive same-speaker chat_logs entries; the last action in the burst determines intent and non-action texts are concatenated as utterance.
counter_offer_predicate: counter iff the most recent prior action tag from either speaker is the opponent's Submit-Deal
